tweets.text:
Building a startup in Web2:

- Need $500K to start
- 18 months to raise
- Give away 20% equity
- Build for 2 years
- Hope someone acquires you

Building in Web3:

- Apply for a grant this weekend
- $10K–$500K non dilutive funding
- Keep 100% of your project
- Ship in 3 months
-

Please, please, please...  

Apply to those open calls, hackathons, grants, creative competitions, and residencies  

Don't just stick to Web3!  

Look at any creative adventure that resonates with you. 

I know the demons of doubt can haunt us, but never stop being the artist

StarkWare has officially opened Starkzap v2 to all developers.

Open-source TypeScript SDK that lets you integrate Bitcoin, stablecoins, and DeFi on Starknet in minutes — gas-free transactions, social login, token swaps, and lending/borrowing.
